title: JED Common tags
description: Common tags used in JED schema for both work and manifestation

accessType.description: Access type of this manifestation, physical/online

code.description: Access type of this manifestation, physical/online as enum

display.description: Access type of this manifestation, physical/online as displayable text

url.description: The actual URL for this manifestation

note.description: A note related to the URL for this manifestation

urlText.description: Description/type of URL as given in manifestation

access.description: Different options for accessing this manifestation, like url etc

dbcWebArchive.description: Is a digital copy of this manifestation saved in the DBC Web Archive

ereol.description: Information related to a manifestation that is accessible on eReolen.dk or eReolen Go

infomediaService.description: If this manifestation can be accessed via Infomedia then ID and license is provided

license.description: Enum stating who can access this article

interLibraryLoanIsPossible.description: Is true when manifestation can be borrowed via interlibrary loan (ILL)

digitalArticleService.description: ISSN used for looking up whether an article can be accessed via Digital Artikel Service

audienceGeneral.description: A single general audience object containing a subject word and a possible associated language

display.description: Appropriate audience for this manifestation
display.origin: Marc field 666u, 667u and 517 / DKABM dcterms:audience with possible xsi:type='dkdcplus:pegi' or xsi:type='dkdcplus:medieraad' or dkabm dc:subject xsi:type='dkdcplus:DBCN'

language.description: The associated language of the audience term, if applicable

childrenOrAdult.description: Is this material for children or adults

code.description: Is this material for children or adults as enum

display.description: Is this material for children or adults as displayable text 'til børn' or 'til voksne'

childrenTopics.description: Subject describing selected topics for children, and a rating.

display.description: The actual specific children subject

classification.description: Details about the classification of this manifestation. Used for DK5 and all other classification systems

display.description: A display string with the classification code + (DK5 only) a possible subject related to the 'code'.
display.origin: The value of 'code' + the value of 'subject'.

dk5Heading.description: DK5 only. The DK5 subject heading for the classification code
dk5Heading.origin: Heading from the DK5 classification system / DKABM dc:subject xsi:type='dkdcplus:DK5-Text'

subject.description: For DK5 only. The specific subject in some DK5 classes, e.g. persons in 99.4

entryType.description: For DK5 only. The DK5 entry type: main entry, national entry, or additional entry and marc field 652
entryType.origin: Marc fields 652/654. Main entries: 652mo/654mo. Additional entries: 652pr/654pr. National bibliography main entry: 652n/654n. National bibliography additional entry: 652q/654q (hoved-, nationalbibliografisk, biplacering)

sort.description: A string with classification code + (if DK5) some related info. String is stripped of special characters to be used for sorting
sort.origin: The value of 'code' + the value of 'subject'; stripped.

contentsEntity.description: Content title entries with possible creators, contributors and playing time for music tracks, sheet music titles, articles, poems, short stories etc.

type.description: ENUM for type of content entries (music tracks, articles, fiction etc.) in this entity

heading.description: Heading for the contents of this entity

contentsUnstructured.description: Contents text note quoted as it is from the marc field. Used for non-machine-decipherable content notes (un)formatted in only 1 subfield)

contentsStructured.description: Object with an array of structured entries for each content element (title, creator, contributors ...)

titlesForSearch.description: Possible title variants of one or more titles quoted in the title entries of the entity
titlesForSearch.origin: Subfield *a in marc fields 795, marked with *y0

contentsEntry.description: Content entry with title and possible creator(s), contributors and (for some music and movies) playing time

title.description: Top level title of the entry

creators.description: Main creator(s) of the entry i.e. composer (classical music), artist/band (rhythmic music), author (fiction, articles). For music and sheet music always only 1 creator, for articles and fiction possibly more than 1

contributorsUnstructured.description: Additional 'authors' (lyricists, arrangers, performers/soloists etc.), quoted as strings (including possible author's statement) from the record

playingTime.description: Playing time for music tracks, quoted from the record

entrySubLevel1.description: Possible entry data (title, creators, contributors, playingtime) subordinate to the entry's top level

contentsEntrySubLevel1.description: Title and possible creators (literature only), contributors and playing time (music only) subordinate to the entry's top level

title.description: Title subordinate to the title in the entry's top level

creators.description: Main authors of articles or fiction entries only, never music or sheet music

contributorsUnstructured.description: Additional 'authors' (lyricists, arrangers, performers/soloists etc.) related to the title on sublevel 1, quoted as strings (including possible author's statement) from the record

entrySubLevel2.description: Possible entry data (title, contributors, playingtime) subordinate to the entry's sublevel 1

contentsEntrySubLevel2.description: Entry data (title and possible contributors and playingtime) subordinate to the entry's sublevel 1

title.description: Title subordinate to the title in the entry's sublevel 1

contributorsUnstructured.description: Additional 'authors' (lyricists, arrangers, performers/soloists etc.) related to the title on sublevel 1, quoted as strings (including possible author's statement) from the record. Music and sheet music only

contentsEntryTitle.description: Title object of the contents entry

display.description: Title of the content entry

titlesForSearch.description: Possible variants of title of the content entry - for search

contentsEntryContributors.description: Contributors to entry + possible function statements quoted in plain text from the marc record
contentsEntryContributors.origin: Marc field 795, subfields *e, *j (all materials) and *i (classical music only)

corporation.description: Details about a corporation or conference, name, role, etc.

display.description: The full corporation or conference name

nameSort.description: The full corporation or conference name to sort after

attributeToName.description: Added information about the corporation, like 710 00a M. Folmer Andersene firma

roles.description: A list of which kinds of contributions this corporation made to this creation

type.description: The type of subject/creator/contributor, when corporation is listed as such

edition.description: The edition/version number and name and possible contributor statements related to the edition

summary.description: Properties 'edition', 'contributorsToEdition' and 'publicationYear' as one string, e.g.: '3. udgave, revideret af Susan Munk, 2005'

edition.description: The edition number and name. In case of corrected edition statements only the corrected form
edition.origin: Marc field 250 *b (first priority) or *a / DKABM dkdcplus:version

contributors.description: Quotation of contributor statements related to the edition

note.description: In case of corrected edition statements and/or year: The 'incorrect' edition statement and/or year stated in the material.

publicationDateForRanking.description: The most specific date possible for the publication, e.g. if news article from January 24th 2019 then '2019-01-24', if journal article from October 2022 then '2022-10-01, if book from 1988 then '1988-01-01' - will be used for ranking in search engines, not for display

ereol.description: Information related to a manifestation that is accessible on eReolen.dk or eReolen Go

url.description: The actual eReolen.dk URL for this manifestation

canAlwaysBeLoaned.description: Is this a manifestation that always can be loaned on ereolen.dk even if you've run out of loans this month

note.description: A note related to the URL for this manifestation

latestPrinting.description: Information about the latest printing of this manifestation e.g.: '11. oplag, 2020'

summary.description: Properties 'printing' and 'publicationYear' as one string, e.g.: '11. oplag, 2020'

publisher.description: Publisher of printing when other than the original publisher of the edition (260*b)

fictionNonfiction.description: Overall literary category/genre of this manifestation. e.g. fiction or nonfiction. In Danish skønlitteratur/faglitteratur for literature, fiktion/nonfiktion for other types.
fictionNonfiction.origin: Many different fields depending on material type, e.g. 008d, 652

display.description: Displayable overall category/genre: skønlitteratur/faglitteratur/fiktion/nonfiktion/vides ikke

forHearingImpaired.description: texted languages for the hearing impaired'
forHearingImpaired.origin: Marc field 041 *t, Marc field 508 *a, Marc field 512 *a

forVisuallyImpaired.description: read languages for the visually impaired'
forVisuallyImpaired.origin: Marc field 041 *q, Marc field 508 *a, Marc field 512 *a

genreAndForm.description: The genre and (literary) form of this work
genreAndForm.origin: Marc field 008dj, 666om, 505 and more / DKABM dc:subject dkdcplus:genre

genreForm.description: The genre and (literary) form of this work (new)
genreForm.origin: Marc fields 008dj, 505, 666om, 667om and more / DKABM dc:subject dkdcplus:genre

display.description: The genre/form term

language.description: Language of the genre/form term, if applicable

identifier.description: Identifier for this entity - often used for search indexes
identifier.origin: Marc field 021aen, 002bd and possibly some music or movie identifier fields / DKABM dc:identifier with possible xsi:type='dkdcplus:ISBN' or xsi:type='dkdcplus:ISSN' or xsi:type='dkdcplus:ISMN'

type.origin: Marc field 002b and possibly some music or movie identifier fields

value.origin: Marc field 002d and possibly some music or movie identifier fields / DKABM dc:identifier

language.description: Language as displayable text and ISO639-1 and ISO639-2 language codes

display.description: Language as displayable text

languageMain.description: The main language(s) of the work's content
languageMain.origin: Marc field 008l if no field 041, otherwise: 041ap / DKABM dc:language xsi:type='dcterms:ISO639-2'

languages.description: Languages as displayable text and ISO639-1 and ISO639-2 language codes

materialType.description: The type of material of the manifestation based on bibliotek.dk types

general.description: The general type of material of the manifestation based on a grouping of bibliotek.dk material types

code.description: The general type of material of the manifestation based on a grouping of bibliotek.dk material types in enums

display.description: Display of general material type enums

specific.description: The specific type of material of the manifestation based on a grouping of bibliotek.dk material types in enums

code.description: The specific type of material of the manifestation based on a grouping of bibliotek.dk material types in enums

display.description: Display of specific material type enums

materialUnit.description: Physical description of a material type unit, e.g. a book, one or more dvds etc.

summary.description: Assembling data from all the other properties, separated by a comma

additionalDescription.description: Other physical description, eg. illustrations, color or b/w, mono/stereo, rpm

extent.description: Number of pages, tab (books, articles etc.) or playingtime (cd, dvd etc.)

playingTime.description: The playing time of the material unit

startPage.description: The first page number in a page range, if applicable

endPage.description: The last page number in a page range, if applicable

numberAndType.description: Number and type of other materials than books/text, e.g. 1 cd, 2 dvds etc.

mood.description: Subject describing the reading experience and mood

display.description: The actual specific mood subject

narrativeTechnique.description: Subject describing the narrative perspective, style and tempo

display.description: The actual specific narrative technique subject

note.description: A note about the work or manifestation

type.description: The type of note - e.g. note about original version, references etc, not_specified if not known

display.description: The actual notes

urls.description: A link and possible link text

manifestationPart.description: An analytic title entry with creator, title, subject and DK5-classification; used for music tracks, sheet music content or literature analysis (book articles about literary works)

title.description: The title of the entry (music track or title of a literary analysis)

display.description: Optional. Title for display

forSearchIndexOnly.description: Optional. Title variant for search indexes only

creators.description: The creator of the music track or literary analysis

classifications.description: Classification of this entry (music track or literary analysis)

subjects.description: Subjects of this entry (music track or literary analysis)

contributorsFromDescription.description: Additional contributor to this entry (music track or literary analysis) as described on the publication. E.g. 'arr.: H. Cornell'

creatorsFromDescription.description: Additional creator to this entry (music track or literary analysis) as described on the publication. E.g. 'arr.: H. Cornell'

playingTime.description: The duration of the music track

relatedPublication.description: Notes about relations to this book/periodical/journal, - like previous names or related journals, or publications in different form

heading.description: Notes describing the relation of the related periodical/journal/publication
heading.origin: Marc field 860-879i plus autogenerated text based on the origin of the 860-879 field, or 523a

urls.description: URLs of the related publication and possible link text

relations.description: Other kinds of manifestations related to this manifestation, like reviews or creator descriptions

continuedIn.description: The story of this article is continued in this or these other article(s)

continues.description: This story of this article actually started in this or these other article(s)

discussedIn.description: The contents of this articles is also discussed in these articles

discusses.description: The article discusses the content of these articles

hasAdaptation.description: This story is adapted in this or these movie(s)

hasAnalysis.description: The contents of this manifestation is analysed in these manifestations

hasCreatorDescription.description: The creator of this manifestation is portrayed in these manifestations

hasDescriptionFromPublisher.description: The publisher of this manifestation has made a description of the content

hasManuscript.description: This movie is based on this manuscript

hasReusedReview.description: This manifestation has a 'materialevurdering' that was originally made for another manifestation, but it is still relevant (e.g. book/ebook)

hasSoundtrack.description: This movie or game has this sound track

isAdaptationOf.description: This movie is based on this or these books

isAnalysisOf.description: This manifestation is an analysis of these manifestations

isDescriptionFromPublisherOf.description: This is a description from the original publisher of these manifestations

isManuscriptOf.description: This movie is based on this manuscript

isReusedReviewOf.description: This 'materialevurdering' can also be used to review these relevant manifestations, even though it was originally made for another publication

isReviewOf.description: This manifestation is a review of these manifestations

isSoundtrackOfGame.description: This sound track for a game is related to these games

isSoundtrackOfMovie.description: This sound track for a movie is related to these movies

isPartOfAlbum.description: This music track is part of these albums

isPartOfManifestation.description: This article or book part can be found in these manifestations

reviewElement.description: If this manifestation is a review, then content from the review is found here

heading.description: a Danish heading for this content: e.g. 'Vurdering'

content.description: The actual text from the review

contentSubstitute.description: The text from the review with PID instead of titles for other works mentioned in the text

pidList.description: List of pid's that are related to the reviewed manifestation

type.description: The type of text from the review

person.description: Details about a person, name, role etc.

display.description: The person's whole name in normal order possibly followed by birthday in parentheses

romanNumeral.description: A roman numeral added to the person, like Christian IV

attributeToName.description: Added information about the person, like Henri, konge af Frankrig

aliases.description: Creator aliases, creators behind used pseudonym

roles.description: A list of which kinds of contributions this person made to this creation
roles.origin: Marc field 100,239,700 subfield 4 / DKABM - dc:creator xsi:type='dkdcplus:<function_code>'

type.description: The type of subject/creator/contributor, when person is listed as such

physicalDescription.description: Physical description of this manifestation like extent (pages/minutes), illustrations etc.
physicalDescription.origin: Marc field 300,501,512 / DKABM dc:format and dcterms:extent

summary.description: A summary of the physical description of this manifestation like extent (pages/minutes), illustrations etc.
summary.origin: Marc field 300,501,512 / DKABM dc:format and dcterms:extent

accompanyingMaterial.description: Material that comes with the manifestation (bilag)

additionalDescription.description: Additional physical description of the manifestation (e.g illustrations etc)

extent.description: Extent of the manifestation like pages and number of items

numberOfPages.description: Number of pages of the manifestation as number

numberOfUnits.description: Number of units, like 3 cassettes, or 1 score etc.

playingTime.description: The playing time of the manifestation (e.g 2 hours 5 minutes)

requirements.description: The necessary equipment to use the material

technicalInformation.description: Technical information about the manifestation (e.g blu-ray disc)

textVsIllustrations.description: Ratio of text vs. illustration from 1-5 as a number, where 1 means no illustrations and 5 means illustrations on all pages

display.description: The publication year and possible end year as text

endYear.description: The publication end year as integer

frequency.description: The publication frequency of the manifestation as text, e.g 'ugentlig/weekly'

range.description: Range of numbers with either beginning of range or end of range or both e.g.  6-10, 1980-1999

begin.description: The beginning of the range of numbers

end.description: The end of the range of numbers

display.description: The range of numbers as a displayable text, if begin=10 and end=12 then '10-12', if begin=1980 and end=1980 then '1980'

type.description: The type of subject, when range is listed as a subject

role.description: A role defining which contribution this creator or contributor made in this creation, as a function code and a text in singular and plural, 'ill', 'illustrator', 'illustratorer'

functionCode.description: The code for the type of creator or contributor, e.g. 'aut' for author, 'ill' for illustrator etc
functionCode.origin: Marc field 100,700 subfield 4 / DKABM - dc:creator xsi:type='dkdcplus:<function_code>'

function.description: The type of creator/contributor as text in singular and plural in Danish, e.g. forfatter/forfattere, komponist/komponister etc
function.origin: Translation of the functionCode to displayable text

plural.description: The type of creator/contributor as text in plural in Danish, e.g. forfattere, komponister, instruktører etc
plural.origin: Translation of the functionCode to displayable text

singular.description: The type of creator/contributor as text in singular in Danish, e.g. forfatter, komponist, instruktør etc
singular.origin: Translation of the functionCode to displayable text

schoolUse.description: Is this material for use in schools (folkeskole/ungdomsuddannelse) or is this material for use in schools by the teacher (folkeskole only)

code.description: Is this material for use in schools (folkeskole/ungdomsuddannelse) or is this material for use in schools by the teacher (folkeskole only) as enum

display.description: Is this material for use in schools (folkeskole/ungdomsuddannelse) 'til skolebrug' or is this material for use in schools by the teacher (folkeskole only) 'til læreren' as displayable text

series.origin: Marc field 440, 526, 845, 245a (multivolume) / DKABM - dc:title series, dc:description series

title.origin: Marc field 440, 526, 845, 245a (multivolume) / DKABM - dc:title series, dc:description series

alternativeTitles.description: A alternative title to the popular title of the series

isPopular.description: Information about whether this is a popular series or general series

matchLanguage.description: The main singular language of the work's content
matchLanguage.origin: First marc field 041a or first marc field 041p

numberInSeries.description: The number in the series as text quotation and a number

display.description: The number in the series as text, quoted form the publication, e.g. 'Vol. IX'

number.description: The number in the series as number, example: 'display': 'Vol. IX'; 'number': '9'

parallelTitles.description: A parallel title to the main 'title' of the series, in a different language

readThisFirst.description: Information about whether this work in the series should be read first

readThisWhenever.description: Information about whether this work in the series can be read without considering the order of the series, it can be read at any time

titlesForSearch.description: Titles of the series including number for search indexes
titlesForSearch.origin: Marc field 440, 526, 845, 245a (multivolume) / DKABM - dc:title series, dc:description series

typeOfSeries.description: Type of series, either publisher series (i.e. 'a Penguin Book'), or regular series title (i.e. 'De 5')

identifyingAddition.description: identifyingAddition additional information added to distinguish series i.e. (julebøger)

display.description: The actual specific setting subject

sheetMusicCategories.description: Material that can be identified as sheet music

instruments.description: The types of instruments material covers

choirTypes.description: The types of choir material covers

forMusicalExercise.description: Is true when material is intended for practising (in combination with an instrument)

chamberMusicTypes.description: The types of chamber music material covers

orchestraTypes.description: The types of orchestra material covers

subject.description: Details about the subject of this work

type.description: The type of subject - 'location', 'time period' etc., 'topic' if not specific kind of subject term

display.description: The actual subject

language.origin: Marc field 667 subfield 8 or hardcoded with data from field 666

local.description: Information about whether this subject comes from a local public or school library or a local bibliography

tableOfContents.description: Quotation of the manifestation's table of contents or similar content list
tableOfContents.origin: Marc field 530 (full content) 534 (partial content) / possibly DKABM - dc:description

timePeriod.description: The time period this entity covers as years in numbers

titleFull.description: The full title of the entity including subtitles etc

titleOriginal.description: The title of the work that this expression/manifestation is translated from or based on. The original title(s) of a film which has added distribution titles in marc field 239 and 739
titleOriginal.origin: Marc field 241ar, 245ax on some films / DKABM: dc:source

titleParallel.description: A parallel title to the main title of the entity, in a different language as found on the publication

titlePlusLanguage.description: The title of the entity with the language of the entity in parenthesis after. This field is only generated for non-danish titles.

titleSort.description: The sorted title of the entity

titleStandard.description: The standard title of the entity, used for music and movies

titleTranslated.description: Danish translation of the main title, not found on the original publication

danishLaunchTitle.description: The Danish launch title of the tv-series

episodeTitles.description: The episode title of the tv-series

season.description: The season number of the tv-series

volume.description: The volume number of the tv-series

episode.description: The episode number of the tv-series

tvSeriesNumber.description: The number of this tv-series episode/season/volume/disc as string and numbers

display.description: The number of the tv-series element as the original string e.g. 'afsnit 12-13'

onlyNumbersAsString.description: Only the numbers of the tv-series element as a string e.g. '12-13'

numbers.description: The numbers of the tv-series element as integers e.g. [12, 13]

universe.description: Literary/movie universe this work is part of e.g. Wizarding World, Marvel Universe

alternativeTitles.description: The alternative titles of the universe

workId.description: Unique identification of the work based on persistent-work-id e.g work-of:870970-basis:54029519. The persistent-work-id is derived from work clusters in Corepo

marcId.description: Unique identification of the MARC representation of the work or manifestation to be used for subsequent lookups via the API gateway

workYear.description: The year this work was originally published or produced
